Description: 7 homes scattered around lovely New Haven decorated for the Christmas Season.  Stroll from home to home wiht friends, taking in the sights and sounds of the holiday season.  Tickets available at Elizabeth's Gifts and Citizens Bank, New Haven.
Quaint boutiques ready for you and the holiday season.  Come enjoy the magic of the season.  Tanglewood Cottage and A Buschel & A Peck both in New Haven

Free horse drawn carriage rides, face painting, Mr & Mrs Claus visiting, letters to Santa, Shops, Vendors, Food, Good Old Fashioned Christmas Fun!   Bring your family or come with friends and spend a day getting in the spirit of the season!

Mark your calendars! Join us Saturday, February 7th from 12–4 PM for the Winter Wine Walk — an afternoon of sipping, shopping, and strolling through beautiful downtown Rosebud!  Come enjoy local shops, friendly faces, and delicious wines — it’s the perfect way to warm up your winter weekend!
Celebrate Small Business Saturday with Elizabeth's Gifts & Antiques! Enjoy 10% off your entire purchase and samples while you shop.

Get ready to shop, stroll, and sample sweet treats in beautiful downtown Hermann, Missouri.  Downtown shops will be offering specials and dressed up in their holiday best, making this a perfect way to support local while enjoying the season.

Come join us for 2 Friday evening to begin your Christmas Tradions in a Small town Christmas fashion:  Lighting of the town Christmas Tree, Carolers, Bonfires, Shopping, Santa, Tree Decorating Contest, Face Painting & Crafts for the kids, and the JOY of the season!
